<div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2"><Badge variant="outline">NA-AI Landing</Badge><Badge>Structure</Badge></div>

## Overview

NA-AI Landing is organized around a simple separation:

> Data controls content. Sections render product blocks. Layout components frame the page. PyColors UI provides primitives.

This keeps customization clean. You can update most copy and content from `src/@data` before touching section components.

<Callout title="Key idea">
  The template is designed so product content can change without rewriting the visual foundation.
</Callout>

  <Folder name="src" defaultOpen>

      <File name="cta.ts" />

      <Folder name="layout"><File name="footer.tsx" /><File name="na-ai-logo.tsx" /><File name="navbar.tsx" /><File name="section-header.tsx" /><File name="theme-provider.tsx" /><File name="toggle-theme.tsx" /></Folder>
      <Folder name="sections"><Folder name="features" /><Folder name="hero" /><File name="contact.tsx" /><File name="cta.tsx" /><File name="customers.tsx" /><File name="faq.tsx" /><File name="integrations.tsx" /><File name="pricing-table.tsx" /><File name="pricing.tsx" /></Folder>
      <Folder name="ui"><File name="browser-window.tsx" /></Folder>
    </Folder>
    <Folder name="config"><File name="fonts.ts" /><File name="site.ts" /></Folder>
  </Folder>
  <Folder name="public" defaultOpen><Folder name="icons" /><Folder name="na-ai" /><Folder name="seo" /><File name="manifest.webmanifest" /></Folder>
</Files>

## Architecture flow

```txt title="architecture-flow.txt"
src/@data
  ↓
components/sections
  ↓
components/layout
  ↓
@pycolors/ui + @pycolors/tokens
```

<Tabs items={["Data", "Sections", "Layout", "UI"]}>
  <Tab value="Data"><div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6"><div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Data layer</div><div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Owns content, lists, pricing values, nav labels, FAQ items, testimonials, and section configuration.</div></div></Tab>
  <Tab value="Sections"><div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6"><div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Section layer</div><div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Renders the product blocks that make the landing page.</div></div></Tab>
  <Tab value="Layout"><div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6"><div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">Layout layer</div><div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Owns navbar, footer, section headers, theme provider, and logo.</div></div></Tab>
  <Tab value="UI"><div className="rounded-2xl border border-border/60 bg-card p-6"><div className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">UI primitives</div><div className="mt-2 text-sm leading-6 text-muted-foreground">Shared primitives come from @pycolors/ui and visual decisions come from @pycolors/tokens.</div></div></Tab>
</Tabs>

## Data directory

| File | Responsibility |
| --- | --- |
| `hero.ts` | Hero copy, CTA, badges, and visual content |
| `features.ts` | AI analytics feature cards and section content |
| `integrations.ts` | Integration categories and integration cards |
| `pricing.ts` | Pricing plans and billing toggle content |
| `pricing-table.ts` | Pricing comparison rows |
| `customers.ts` | Testimonials and customer proof |
| `faq.ts` | FAQ content |
| `contact.ts` | Contact form copy and goal options |
| `cta.ts` | Final conversion section |
| `navbar.ts` | Navigation links |
| `footer.ts` | Footer links and copy |

<Callout title="Customization rule">
  Change data first. Edit section components only when the structure no longer supports your content.
</Callout>

## Add a new section

<Steps>
  <Step>
  ### Create the data file
```bash title="terminal"
touch src/@data/use-cases.ts
```
</Step>
  <Step>
  ### Create the section component
```bash title="terminal"
touch src/components/sections/use-cases.tsx
```
</Step>
  <Step>
  ### Compose it in the page
```tsx title="src/app/page.tsx"
import { UseCasesSection } from "@/components/sections/use-cases";

export default function Page() {
  return <UseCasesSection />;
}
```
</Step>
</Steps>

## Prefer / avoid

<PreferAvoid
  prefer={[
    'data-driven content',
    'small section components',
    'shared PyColors primitives',
    'semantic tokens',
    'isolated template-specific UI',
  ]}
  avoid={[
    'hardcoding all copy in components',
    'putting backend logic in sections',
    'duplicating layout wrappers',
    'removing token imports',
    'forking shared UI primitives unnecessarily',
  ]}
/>

## Common questions

<Accordions type="single">
  <Accordion title="Why keep content in src/@data?">It makes the landing page easier to customize and keeps section components focused on presentation.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Can I move data elsewhere?">Yes, but keep the same separation: content should stay separate from presentational components.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Can I connect a CMS?">Yes. Replace the data source with CMS data gradually, while keeping the section components stable.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Can I remove PyColors UI?">You can, but it is not recommended unless you want to rebuild the UI foundation yourself.</Accordion>
</Accordions>
